name: Nevada State Contractors Board License Search
updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official license search before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Nevada State Contractors Board licenses exposed by the official license search
Class A general engineering, Class B general building, Class AB, and Class C specialty contractor classifications
NAC Chapter 624 classifications and subclassifications referenced by the official board classification page
knownExclusions: This registry entry is for an official lookup path, not a confirmed bulk download.
The official search disclaimer says displayed information may not reflect recent changes and completeness or accuracy is not guaranteed.
Local permits, business registrations, inspections, and non-NSCB authorizations are outside this source entry.
Trade coverage is limited to the classification and monetary limit printed on each license.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Do not automate lookup pages unless access terms and technical controls are reviewed.
publicRecordsNotes: Official lookup source metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Nevada contractor-board verification. The official NSCB classification page and NAC Chapter 624 references cover every tracked statewide trade domain, but the lookup remains manual while access behavior, response stability, and reuse terms are adapter-reviewed.
maintainerNotes: Preserve classification, subclassification, monetary-limit, and official search disclaimer caveats in any future verification result.

researchEvidence.note: Official public source, access shape, and current automation constraints reviewed.

The official NSCB classification page lists A general engineering, B general building, AB, and C specialty classification structures and points to NAC Chapter 624 for detailed subclassification scopes.
NAC Chapter 624 contains the official contractor classification and subclassification provisions for plumbing, electrical, sheet metal, roofing, HVAC, solar, and related trades.

blocker.summary: No stable, documented machine-readable official interface is currently suitable for an offline-tested adapter.
